comment: Vincent fixed my engine in no time! Honest and very professional. He came to my house and had it sorted in 2 hours.
Best mechanic in Kimana! I've tried others but Vincent is the most reliable. His prices are fair and he explains everything clearly.
Called him at 10 PM when my car broke down. He was there in 30 minutes! Real 24/7 service. Can't thank him enough.
Great mechanic! Fixed my brakes and suspension. Works with other mechanics for complex jobs - very honest approach.
Vincent is a lifesaver! My car wouldn't start and he came to my office parking lot. Quick diagnostic and repair. Highly recommend!
